title: connect boards on subitem-level workforms
excerpt: Connecting to other boards on the subitem level of workforms, or having the ability to set conditions to the subitem level that’ll allow form-fillers to select items from other boards based on other criteria would be imm…

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml:
Connecting to other boards on the subitem level of workforms, or having the ability to set conditions to the subitem level that’ll allow form-fillers to select items from other boards based on other criteria would be immensely helpful.

See example of second option here:

Screenshot 2025-03-23 at 20.24.07595×364 21.3 KB
